title: U.S. federal AI use case inventories
coveredPublicBodies: U.S. federal agencies publishing AI use-case inventory materials.
summary: AI.gov inventory page for U.S. federal government AI use cases and agency inventory links.
caveat: Public-sector transparency context; not a private-sector frontier-lab obligation.
sourceName: AI.gov - Federal AI Use Case Inventories
verificationNotes: Official AI.gov page lists federal AI use-case inventory materials and agency links.

title: Canada Algorithmic Impact Assessment tool
coveredPublicBodies: Canadian federal departments using automated decision systems under the Directive on Automated Decision-Making.
summary: Mandatory public-sector risk assessment tool for automated decision systems under Canadian federal digital-government policy.
caveat: Applies to covered public-sector automated decision systems; not a general private-sector AI regulation.
verificationNotes: Official Canada.ca page calls the AIA a mandatory risk assessment tool supporting the Directive on Automated Decision-Making.
